allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "Stopped PID $_" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, StartTime })

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/routes/apiRoutes.js'\); require\('./src/services/serviceReportStats.js'\); require\('./src/services/sheetsService.js'\); console.log\('OK: all server modules load without syntax errors'\)")
